# Smart Pay Engine

> AI-powered multi-currency payment intelligence. Smart Pay Engine helps operators send, convert and reconcile money across USD, EUR and GBP with intelligent routing, PIN-confirmed transfers and AI-scored reversal analysis.

Smart Pay Engine is a sandbox fintech platform that combines a double-entry ledger, live FX conversion, invoicing with automatic tax set-aside, and an AI assistant (Hive) that drafts payments, previews fees and success probability, and executes only after user PIN confirmation.

## Pages

- [Dashboard](/): Live multi-currency balances, recent activity and AI recommendations.
- [Sign in](/auth): Create a sandbox account or sign in to Smart Pay Engine.
- [Invoices](/invoices): Create shareable invoices with automatic tax set-aside, PDF export and sandbox pay links.
- [Insights](/insights): Analytics on smart-routing savings, arrival times and reversal recovery.
- [Convert currency](/convert): Convert USD, EUR and GBP at live mid-market rates with a transparent 0.5% spread.

## Optional

- [Assistant](/assistant): Chat with Hive, the Smart Pay Engine AI, to draft payments and analyse reversals.
